svg.title: Living + kitchen memory fragment (apartment three) - domestic routines softly blending together
svg.desc: One half-remembered room: the kitchen and the living room sharing the same wall. On the left, a vintage cream refrigerator hums quietly with handwritten notes, drawings, and small magnets pinned across its lower door. To the right of the fridge, a small counter holds a few repurposed yogurt and jam jars used as food storage, labels rubbed almost off. On the right, a small CRT television sits on a low walnut stand, its screen muted and quietly cycling between a daytime show, an earlier apartment glimpsed in the glass, and the warm window of a far building seen through static. Above the TV, a small framed photograph. The cropped corner of a dusty rose couch is just visible at the right edge of the frame. The fridge glow and the TV glow pool together on the floor between them. A warm ambient overlay drifts very gently across the whole scene, the way the lighting in a familiar apartment shifts between hours without your noticing. Soft amber dust motes. The whole memory feels like several years of quiet evenings settling on top of each other.
